description:
This add-on provides essential features for NVDA users relying on braille support. The following features, deriving from Braille Extender, are available:

* Reload two favorite braille display with shortcuts.
* Automatic review cursor tethering in terminal role like in PuTTY, Powershell, bash, cmd.
* Auto scroll.
* Switch between several input/output braille tables.
* Mark the text with special attributes through dot 7, dot 8 or both.
* Use two output braille tables simultaneously.
* Display tab signs as spaces.
* Reverse forward scroll and back scroll buttons.
* Say the current line during text scrolling either in review mode, or in focus mode or both.
* Translate text easily in Unicode braille and vice versa. E.g.: z <--> ⠵.
* Convert cell description to Unicode braille and vice versa. E.g.: 123 <--> ⠇.
* Lock braille keyboard.
* Launch an application/URL with gesture.
* Braille dictionaries.
* Type with one-hand from braille keyboard.
* Display undefined characters from braille tables (including emojis) using altenative representations.
* Enter any character from braille keyboard (including emojis).
* Skip blank lines during text scrolling.
* Speech History Mode.

And much more.

For some braille displays, it extends the braille display commands to provide:

* Offer complete gesture maps including function keys, multimedia keys, quick navigation, etc.
* Emulate modifier keys, and thus any keyboard shortcut
* Offer several keyboard configurations concerning the possibility to input dots 7 and 8, enter and backspace
* Add actions and quick navigation through a rotor
changelog:
* Updated the add-on code to Braille Extender commit 38b6fa35 (2026-07-03), introducing enhanced braille support for Microsoft Excel and localization updates.
* NVDA will honor custom braille routing commands from apps, specifically Punktum (issue 2).

Changes from BrailleExtender:

* No statement on add-on store based update process in add-on settings/general category (Braille Essentials does not have a self-updating mechanism).
* Brailiant B profile: Removed Control+Alt+Tab keystroke emulation (Space with dots 5-6-8/C1+C3+C5) as it conflicts with review copy comand.

translations.description:
Bu eklenti, Braille desteğine güvenen NVDA kullanıcıları için temel özellikler sağlar. Braille Extender eklentisinden türetilen aşağıdaki özellikler mevcuttur:

* İki favori Braille ekranını kısayollarla yeniden yükleme.
* PuTTY, Powershell, bash, cmd gibi uçbirim (terminal) rollerinde inceleme imlecinin otomatik olarak kilitlenmesi/bağlanması.
* Otomatik kaydırma.
* Birkaç giriş/çıkış Braille tablosu arasında geçiş yapma.
* Metni, nokta 7, nokta 8 veya her ikisi aracılığıyla özel niteliklerle işaretleme.
* Aynı anda iki çıktı Braille tablosunu kullanma.
* Sekme (tab) işaretlerini boşluk olarak gösterme.
* İleri kaydırma ve geri kaydırma düğmelerini tersine çevirme.
* Metin kaydırma sırasında, inceleme modunda, odak modunda veya her ikisinde de mevcut satırı seslendirme.
* Metni Unicode Braille'e kolayca dönüştürme ve tersini yapma. Örneğin: z <--> ⠵.
* Hücre açıklamasını Unicode Braille'e dönüştürme ve tersini yapma. Örneğin: 123 <--> ⠇.
* Braille klavyesini kilitleme.
* Bir hareketle (kısayol tuşu/komutla) bir uygulamayı/URL'yi başlatma.
* Braille sözlükleri.
* Braille klavyesinden tek elle yazma.
* Braille tablolarında tanımlanmamış karakterleri (emojiler dahil) alternatif gösterimler kullanarak görüntüleme.
* Braille klavyesinden herhangi bir karakteri (emojiler dahil) girme.
* Metin kaydırma sırasında boş satırları atlama.
* Konuşma Geçmişi Modu.

Ve çok daha fazlası.

Bazı Braille ekranları için, aşağıdaki işlevleri sağlamak üzere Braille ekranı komutlarını genişletir:

* İşlev tuşları, multimedya tuşları, hızlı dolaşım vb. dahil olmak üzere eksiksiz hareket haritaları sunma.
* Değiştirici tuşları (Ctrl, Shift vb.) simüle etme ve böylece herhangi bir klavye kısayolunu kullanabilme.
* Nokta 7 ve 8'i, enter ve backspace tuşlarını girme olasılığına ilişkin çeşitli klavye yapılandırmaları sunma.
* Bir rotor (döndürücü) aracılığıyla eylemler ve hızlı dolaşım ekleme
translations.changelog:
* Updated the add-on code to Braille Extender commit 38b6fa35 (2026-07-03), introducing enhanced braille support for Microsoft Excel and localization updates.
* NVDA will honor custom braille routing commands from apps, specifically Punktum (issue 2).

Changes from BrailleExtender:

* No statement on add-on store based update process in add-on settings/general category (Braille Essentials does not have a self-updating mechanism).
* Brailiant B profile: Removed Control+Alt+Tab keystroke emulation (Space with dots 5-6-8/C1+C3+C5) as it conflicts with review copy comand.

translations.description:
This add-on provides essential features for NVDA users relying on braille support. The following features, deriving from Braille Extender, are available:

* Reload two favorite braille display with shortcuts.
* Automatic review cursor tethering in terminal role like in PuTTY, Powershell, bash, cmd.
* Auto scroll.
* Switch between several input/output braille tables.
* Mark the text with special attributes through dot 7, dot 8 or both.
* Use two output braille tables simultaneously.
* Display tab signs as spaces.
* Reverse forward scroll and back scroll buttons.
* Say the current line during text scrolling either in review mode, or in focus mode or both.
* Translate text easily in Unicode braille and vice versa. E.g.: z <--> ⠵.
* Convert cell description to Unicode braille and vice versa. E.g.: 123 <--> ⠇.

* Type with one-hand from braille keyboard.
* Display undefined characters from braille tables (including emojis) using altenative representations.
* Enter any character from braille keyboard (including emojis).
* Skip blank lines during text scrolling.
* Speech History Mode.

And much more.

For some braille displays, it extends the braille display commands to provide:

* Offer complete gesture maps including function keys, multimedia keys, quick navigation, etc.
* Emulate modifier keys, and thus any keyboard shortcut
* Offer several keyboard configurations concerning the possibility to input dots 7 and 8, enter and backspace
* Add actions and quick navigation through a rotor

* Skip blank lines during text scrolling.
* Speech History Mode.

And much more.

For some braille displays, it extends the braille display commands to provide:

* Offer complete gesture maps including function keys, multimedia keys, quick navigation, etc.
* Emulate modifier keys, and thus any keyboard shortcut
* Offer several keyboard configurations concerning the possibility to input dots 7 and 8, enter and backspace
* Add actions and quick navigation through a rotor
translations.changelog:
* Updated the add-on code to Braille Extender commit 38b6fa35 (2026-07-03), introducing enhanced braille support for Microsoft Excel and localization updates.
* NVDA will honor custom braille routing commands from apps, specifically Punktum (issue 2).

Changes from BrailleExtender:

* No statement on add-on store based update process in add-on settings/general category (Braille Essentials does not have a self-updating mechanism).
* Brailiant B profile: Removed Control+Alt+Tab keystroke emulation (Space with dots 5-6-8/C1+C3+C5) as it conflicts with review copy comand.

translations.description:
This add-on provides essential features for NVDA users relying on braille support. The following features, deriving from Braille Extender, are available:

* Reload two favorite braille display with shortcuts.
* Automatic review cursor tethering in terminal role like in PuTTY, Powershell, bash, cmd.
* Auto scroll.
* Switch between several input/output braille tables.
* Mark the text with special attributes through dot 7, dot 8 or both.
* Use two output braille tables simultaneously.
* Display tab signs as spaces.
* Reverse forward scroll and back scroll buttons.
* Say the current line during text scrolling either in review mode, or in focus mode or both.
* Translate text easily in Unicode braille and vice versa. E.g.: z <--> ⠵.
* Convert cell description to Unicode braille and vice versa. E.g.: 123 <--> ⠇.
* Lock braille keyboard.
* Launch an application/URL with gesture.
* Braille dictionaries.
* Type with one-hand from braille keyboard.
* Display undefined characters from braille tables (including emojis) using altenative representations.
* Enter any character from braille keyboard (including emojis).
* Skip blank lines during text scrolling.
* Speech History Mode.

And much more.

For some braille displays, it extends the braille display commands to provide:

* Offer complete gesture maps including function keys, multimedia keys, quick navigation, etc.
* Emulate modifier keys, and thus any keyboard shortcut
* Offer several keyboard configurations concerning the possibility to input dots 7 and 8, enter and backspace
* Add actions and quick navigation through a rotor
translations.changelog:
* Updated the add-on code to Braille Extender commit 38b6fa35 (2026-07-03), introducing enhanced braille support for Microsoft Excel and localization updates.
* NVDA will honor custom braille routing commands from apps, specifically Punktum (issue 2).

Changes from BrailleExtender:

* No statement on add-on store based update process in add-on settings/general category (Braille Essentials does not have a self-updating mechanism).
* Brailiant B profile: Removed Control+Alt+Tab keystroke emulation (Space with dots 5-6-8/C1+C3+C5) as it conflicts with review copy comand.
